description: Internal Acme Health Slack channel for Project Meridian coordination. DataBridge and CloudPeak do not have access.

messages.author: marcus.webb
messages.text: just sent the v1.1 mapping comments to DataBridge. linda did a thorough job catching those ADT issues. fingers crossed Tom turns this around fast, we're tight on time

messages.author: sarah.chen
messages.text: 👍 thanks for driving that. let me know if you don't hear back by Wednesday

messages.author: marcus.webb
messages.text: nothing from Tom. sent 2 days ago. sarah, when's the next touchpoint with DataBridge?

messages.author: sarah.chen
messages.text: i have a sync invite out to kevin for tomorrow. if he doesn't respond I'll push harder. tom usually responds within a day or two, maybe he's heads down on something

messages.author: linda.marsh
messages.text: quick question — should I email Tom directly about the extension #12 coding type question? I have more context on the reference lab system that might help move things

messages.author: marcus.webb
messages.text: yes please do, cc me. the more channels the better at this point

messages.author: linda.marsh
messages.text: sent. also tried to find Tom on the DataBridge website to see if there was another phone number. his bio isn't on their website anymore 🤔 probably just a web update thing

messages.author: sarah.chen
messages.text: kevin didn't respond to the thursday invite either. going to try calling him. this is getting weird

messages.author: marcus.webb
messages.text: voicemail?

messages.author: sarah.chen
messages.text: voicemail. left a message. will give it until monday

messages.author: marcus.webb
messages.text: sarah — looked at tom's linkedin last night. he has a new position listed. started 'january 2026' at veriflow health. think he left databrdige

messages.author: sarah.chen
messages.text: oh no. that would explain everything. I'll bring this up in the status sync tomorrow

messages.author: marcus.webb
messages.text: do we need to loop in diana NOW? this feels like exec-level information

messages.author: sarah.chen
messages.text: let me confirm with databrdige first. I don't want to go to diana with a rumor from linkedin. let me get facts then I'll escalate if needed. sending another invite to the databrige team now

messages.author: sarah.chen
messages.text: 🚨 confirmed. tom left databrdige jan 23. aisha is taking over. we're getting on a call at 3pm today. the mapping review we sent on jan 20 sat in tom's inbox the whole time. 9 days lost

messages.author: marcus.webb
messages.text: nine days. we're already past the architecture delivery date to cloudpeak

messages.author: marcus.webb
messages.text: does diana know

messages.author: sarah.chen
messages.text: not yet. I'm telling her tonight or tomorrow after I know where aisha stands. call at 3 will tell us a lot

messages.author: linda.marsh
messages.text: the email I sent tom on the 23rd about extension #12 — aisha has tom's inbox now so she's seen it. that's one thing at least

messages.author: sarah.chen
messages.text: post-call update: aisha is competent and genuinely on it. she estimates she can have v1.2 of the mapping to us by feb 2. architecture package to cloudpeak by feb 3. I told priya. priya is... not thrilled but said we might still make feb 14 if everything else moves perfectly. will update diana tonight

messages.author: marcus.webb
messages.text: 'if everything else moves perfectly' has not been the theme of this project 😬

messages.author: sarah.chen
messages.text: @marcus — just got jordan mills' email. security config for single phase is more involved than cloudpeak thought. they need 10-12 days from now to be production-ready for write-path traffic. feb 14 for full cutover is gone

messages.author: marcus.webb
messages.text: how did we not know this sooner

messages.author: sarah.chen
messages.text: cloudpeak built on the original phased-approach security assumptions and the architecture change (single phase) landed on them late because of the databrdige situation. jordan couldn't have flagged this earlier without the architecture doc, and that doc was late. so it's a cascade

messages.author: marcus.webb
messages.text: and the phasing decision was made on jan 14 and cloudpeak wasn't in that meeting

messages.author: sarah.chen
messages.text: correct. that's on me. I'm calling diana now
